videos.headline: 'All-time classic!': Texas INT seals 2OT win over ASU
videos.description: Texas' Andrew Mukuba comes up with a big interception in the second overtime to seal the victory in the Peach Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('All-time classic!': Texas INT seals 2OT win over ASU) 2025/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas outlasts Arizona State in 2OT classic to reach semifinals
videos.description: Texas blows a lead in the fourth quarter but comes up clutch in double overtime to pull out a Peach Bowl win over Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Texas outlasts Arizona State in 2OT classic to reach semifinals) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas gifts Arizona State first down after running into the kicker penalty
videos.description: Texas' Morice Blackwell Jr. misses a blocked punt and ends up running into the kicker for a penalty, giving Arizona State a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas gifts Arizona State first down after running into the kicker penalty) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas goes 77 yards in 2 plays for opening-drive TD
videos.description: On Texas' first play from scrimmage, Matthew Golden hauls in a 54-yard reception.  On the second play, Quinn Ewers links up with DeAndre Moore Jr. for a 23-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas goes 77 yards in 2 plays for opening-drive TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'Goodbye!': Silas Bolden houses 75-yard punt return for TD
videos.description: Silas Bolden breaks free and goes 75 yards on a punt return for a Texas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('Goodbye!': Silas Bolden houses 75-yard punt return for TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo gets stuffed on fourth down
videos.description: Texas gets the ball back after the defense denies Cam Skattebo on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo gets stuffed on fourth down) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Skattebo upset on sideline after fourth-down stop
videos.description: Arizona State running back Cam Skattebo is furious on the sideline after being stopped on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Skattebo upset on sideline after fourth-down stop) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arizona State's stellar fake punt keeps the drive alive
videos.description: Arizona State gets a first down on a fake punt as Kanyon Floyd finds reserve defensive tackle Blazen Lono-Wong for a 32-yard gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona State's stellar fake punt keeps the drive alive) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas blocks a field goal to end the half
videos.description: Texas heads into halftime with momentum by blocking Arizona State's field goal attempt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas blocks a field goal to end the half) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Skattebo swallowed by the Texas defense for a fourth-down stop
videos.description: Cam Skattebo is stopped for no gain on fourth down for another turnover on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Skattebo swallowed by the Texas defense for a fourth-down stop) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: ASU gets the safety after tackling Ewers in the end zone
videos.description: Texas running back Quintrevion Wisner gets the ball knocked loose and, it's picked up by Quinn Ewers, who gets stopped in the end zone for a safety.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (ASU gets the safety after tackling Ewers in the end zone) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers scrambles into the end zone for a Texas TD
videos.description: Texas goes up 16 in the fourth quarter as Quinn Ewers avoids the pressure and gets into the end zone for a rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers scrambles into the end zone for a Texas TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo shows off the arm with a 42-yard TD pass
videos.description: Arizona State gets back into the game as Cam Skattebo takes the toss and heaves it downfield to Malik McClain for a 42-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo shows off the arm with a 42-yard TD pass) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: ASU hyped after Javan Robinson picks off Quinn Ewers
videos.description: Arizona State keeps the momentum as Javan Robinson goes up and snags the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (ASU hyped after Javan Robinson picks off Quinn Ewers) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Skattebo gets ASU in scoring position with a long catch
videos.description: Sam Leavitt goes deep to Cam Skattebo for a huge gain to set Arizona State up inside the Texas 10-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Skattebo gets ASU in scoring position with a long catch) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Skattebo scores the TD and 2-point conversion to tie it for ASU
videos.description: Arizona State ties it as Cam Skattebo scores the touchdown then follows it up with the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Skattebo scores the TD and 2-point conversion to tie it for ASU) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas sends potential go-ahead FG wide right
videos.description: Bert Auburn sends the Longhorns' potential go-ahead field goal attempt wide right.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Texas sends potential go-ahead FG wide right) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Targeting not called on ASU's late third-down attempt
videos.description: Texas gets the stop on third down as they avoid the targeting penalty in final minute.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Targeting not called on ASU's late third-down attempt) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas doinks potential walk-off FG attempt
videos.description: Bert Auburn sends his potential walk-off FG attempt off the left upright as time expires.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas doinks potential walk-off FG attempt) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Skattebo carried in for Arizona State TD in OT
videos.description: Cam Skattebo takes the handoff and gets carried across the goal line by one of his offensive linemen in OT for Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Skattebo carried in for Arizona State TD in OT) 2025/1/1

videos.headline: Matthew Golden snags TD for Texas on 4th-and-13 to force 2OT
videos.description: On fourth down, Quinn Ewers tosses to Matthew Golden in the end zone for the tying touchdown to force second overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Matthew Golden snags TD for Texas on 4th-and-13 to force 2OT) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas strikes for TD on first play of 2OT
videos.description: On the first play of second overtime, Quinn Ewers passes to Gunnar Helm for a touchdown and the Longhorns convert the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Texas strikes for TD on first play of 2OT) 2025/1/1

videos.headline: Sarkisian credits 'big-time plays' in Texas' 2OT win
videos.description: Texas coach Steve Sarkisian applauds his players for coming through in the clutch moments to defeat Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Sarkisian credits 'big-time plays' in Texas' 2OT win) 2025/1/1

videos.headline: ASU's Skattebo praises Dillingham, Leavitt after Peach Bowl loss
videos.description: Arizona State star RB Cam Skattebo speaks highly of Sam Leavitt and Kenny Dillingham following his final game as a Sun Devil.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (ASU's Skattebo praises Dillingham, Leavitt after Peach Bowl loss) 2025/01/01
